Sea-view room★★★★★ 4.9 · 410 stays

Ocean Room

Light, breezy and built entirely around the view. A king bed dressed in crisp linen, a private balcony that hangs over the sand, and floor-to-ceiling glass that opens to the sound of the surf.

2Guests
1King bed
36 m²Room & balcony
180°Sea view

Made for slow mornings

Wake with the light, throw open the doors, and take your coffee on the balcony as the bay comes alive below. Inside: a deep rain shower, a marble vanity, and the kind of bed you have to be talked out of. Housekeeping twice daily, turndown each evening, and the beach a barefoot minute away.

In the room

Private sea-view balcony
King bed & premium linen
Air-conditioning & fan
Rain shower & marble bath
Minibar & Nespresso
Smart TV & fast Wi-Fi
Twice-daily housekeeping
Beach, pool & spa access

Your rate includes

Breakfast for two, daily
Beach, pool & gym
Wi-Fi & secure parking
No booking fees
R3,900/ night
R3,900 × 3 nightsR11,700
Taxes & serviceIncluded
TotalR11,700
3 nights · no booking fees, ever

Oceans View

A bright beachfront resort on the sand at Camps Bay, Cape Town. Sea-view rooms, three pools, a spa, and a slower way to do summer.
